calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Christopher Pike, Esq. for Plaintiff: Michael Brooks Carroll, ind. and dba. Law Offices of Michael Brooks Carroll, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Abhigit Bhattacharya as follows:
Damages $36,111.96
Prejudgment Interest $6,121.90
Costs $626.50, for a total of $42,860.36
Judgment signed in open court.
